text.message: Green are you leaving me my wood port
Trouble tends to find me anyway
I have it green, save your roads :/
Just realised how scary blue is going to be
Game was over for me before it began
But just happy for it to be over
I can't believe that's the card you robbed
No offense green but you going for that wood port left me no option but to leave the whole map for blue
Weirdest board I've seen in ages
What other option did I have?
Go back and look at my pick at the end. I did not want the wood pile lol
Orange doesn’t produce wood charge two cards
Do you always complain this much when you're winning?
I’m not winning. 0 dev cards and 0 cities I’m not holding this lead for very long at all
It's competitive enough between the three of you that putting it on all three seems pretty fair
I think blue is creeping ahead of me, new spot and multiple ore spaces
I had no interest in competing road. Was just gonna stay out of it as someone with no skin in the game. But the amount of bellyaching swung it
lol you can even win I think
blue tho... going to hurt me
Letting the bot decide. Too close to call
